meta.title: Frontend Notes
meta.description: Learn by building. Frontend development notes.

hero.description: I am Jacky. I specialize in the React ecosystem and hold an almost obsessive standard for code quality. I enjoy abstracting complex problems into elegant and scalable technical architecture.

component.title: Lean Components
component.description: I believe a component should not exceed 200 lines. Clear responsibility boundaries keep code readable and maintainable.

state.title: State Purity
state.description: I strictly follow one-way data flow and avoid passing Hooks as props to preserve architectural purity.

automation.title: Automated Quality
automation.description: A robust CI/CD pipeline ensures every line merged into master meets quality standards.

footer.quote: When I am not coding, I look for melodies beyond logic on the piano keys.
